headlines.title_cn: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
headlines.title_en: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
headlines.summary_cn: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]
headlines.summary_en: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. items.title_cn: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
items.title_en: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
items.summary_cn: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.
items.summary_en: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.
